config.document_creator.disabled_desc: Enable this tool to allow the agent to create PDFs and convert documents.
help.document_creator.backend: Maroto is a pure Go PDF library with no external dependencies. Gotenberg is a Docker service with full document conversion, screenshots, and office format support.
help.document_creator.gotenberg_timeout: Maximum time in seconds to wait for document generation.
help.document_creator.gotenberg_url: Base URL of the Gotenberg service (e.g. http://gotenberg:3000).
help.document_creator.output_dir: Directory where generated documents are saved.
